particulars.description: All and whole that plot or area of ground forming part of the lands and estate of glengarry and glenquioich at invergarry shown coloured pink on the plan annexed to the standard security, which plot or area of ground forming part and portion of all and whole the lands and estate of glengarry and glenquoich at invergarry being the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number INV43262.

All and whole the subjects shown delineated in red on the plan annexed and executed as relative to the standard security (the "security subjects") which security subjects form part and portion of all and whole the subjects known as lands and estates of glengarry and glenquoich registered in the land register of scotland under title number INV43262.

All and whole the subjects shown delineated in black and. Shaded pink on the plan annexed and signed as relative hereto and the access road shown by the. Broken red line on said plan which subject both form part and portion of all and whole the. Subjects known as and forming the lands and estates of glengarry and glenqouich at invergarry. Registered in the land register of scotland under title number INV43262.

particulars.description: (First) those subjects at loch lochy at aberchalder estate, invergarry, being the subjects hatched yellow on plan 17 annexed and executed as relative to the disposition in favour of aberchalder & glengarry estates limited currently undergoing registration in the land register of scotland under title number INV43262 and (second) those subjects being the whole right to fish for salmon in loch lochy so far as in the ownership of the owner.
